query: I just finished a big overhaul on my atlas plugin -- rewrote 3 skills and added a new agent. can you do a health check on it before I release?
how healthy is plugin-ops? I havent looked at it in a while and want to make sure nothing is broken
audit the beads plugin at ~/dev/tools/beads -- I want to know if the knowledge files are too big and if the skills have good trigger phrases
run a self-assessment on my famdeck-toolkit, its been through a lot of changes lately
I want a full quality report on this plugin before shipping it to the team
check if my plugin structure is correct -- does it have all the required files?
is this plugin any good? give me an honest assessment of its skills, knowledge files, and overall quality
review my plugin after I made changes to the hooks and added a new MCP server
my beads list command isnt working when I say 'show me open issues' -- can you figure out why?
I need to slim down my plugin, the knowledge files are way too big -- can you help me reduce them?
create a new plugin for managing docker containers with skills for build, run, and deploy
release plugin-ops version 2.0.0 -- bump the version and push
review this pull request on github -- check the code quality and leave comments
add my plugin to the marketplace so other people can install it
can you look at my tsconfig.json and tell me if my typescript configuration is correct?
I need to validate that my helm chart values match the uniform-service pattern -- can you check?
write a SKILL.md for a new 'deploy' skill that handles kubernetes deployments
run the test suite for my python project and tell me what failed
